5267bfd03f1f4f25a0d866dda19c9a816b05ae62.text: I can sell you up to [number] additional bank slots in sets of 40. How many are you interested in buying?

8711590acfec471a9f59192dadfd8029dfad5df7.text: Buying [number] additional bank slots will cost [number] coins. Be warned, this purchase is not reversible. Are you happy to proceed?

be9f68908f9186c225496ae75341ef81ccb37ede.text: I'm not supposed to tell you this, but you can obtain more bank space by [setting up a PIN], [setting up an Authenticator] [or] [upgrading to a Jagex Account].
